novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: Misses Hess, Frauen, Melnychuk, and Feuerriegel 2025, 'Efficient and Sharp Off-Policy Learning under Unobserved Confounding,' which is a closer sharp off-policy value bound comparator than several listed papers.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: The non-rectangularity/sharpness-failure claim attacks 'independently adding' separate robustness bounds but names no published estimator, paper, or workflow that actually recommends that operation; tier=letter below novelty_target=field unless a concrete target is named or the result is reframed.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The zero-budget singleton claim needs a nonempty-admissible-set condition; otherwise arbitrary observed P with p_a(x) != e0(a|x) or observed arm means inconsistent with m0 yields an empty identified set, not the stated singleton.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The conditional constraints use p_a(x)\bar y_a(x) for all actions although \bar y_a(x)=E[Y|X=x,A=a] was defined only when the arm cell has positive probability; replace with E[Y 1{A=a}|X=x] or give a zero-cell convention.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The comparator 'independently adding the sharp propensity-sensitivity relaxation to the worst-case outcome-regression perturbation' is not formally defined as a bound functional, so the strict-gap statement lacks a precise right-hand side.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add a feasibility/nonemptiness convention for Theta_I(P;rho,eta), and state Theorem 1 only on the calibrated zero-budget face where p_a=e0 and observed arm means agree with m0.
Define the separate-propensity, separate-outcome, and additive/intersection benchmark functionals explicitly before Conjecture 2.
Add Hess et al. 2025 to Related work and explain precisely why its sharp off-policy value bound under unobserved confounding does not subsume the joint outcome-regression-tube identified set.

For Conjecture 2, either name a published separate-robustness workflow that the phase-transition refutes, or demote it to an internal geometry corollary and make Conjecture 1 the sole field-level kernel.

recommended_next_step: Revise the proposal by repairing the zero-cell/nonemptiness definitions, adding the missed sharp OPL comparator, and giving Conjecture 2 a named published target or a non-strawman formulation.
